---
title: "Projects"
---

A selected collection of academic, professional, and personal projects that reflect my interests in analytics, market intelligence, marketing strategy, and business storytelling.

::: {.project-showcase}

::: {.project-card .featured}
<span class="project-number">01</span>

<img src="assets/intersystems-logo.png" class="project-logo">

<i class="fa-solid fa-globe project-icon"></i>

## Market Intelligence Website

**InterSystems Market Intelligence Platform**

Designed and developed a responsive website to present company research, product insights, market positioning, and strategic questions in a more visual and interactive format.

::: {.project-tags}
<span>Market Intelligence</span>
<span>Web Design</span>
<span>Research</span>
<span>Storytelling</span>
:::

[View Website](https://intersystems-intelligence.vercel.app/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-number">02</span>
<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-simple project-icon"></i>

## Labor Market Analytics

Analyzed employment and hiring patterns using large datasets to understand industry-level workforce trends and differences across groups.

::: {.project-tags}
<span>Python</span>
<span>SQL</span>
<span>Data Visualization</span>
<span>GitHub</span>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-number">03</span>
<i class="fa-solid fa-bullhorn project-icon"></i>

## Marketing Growth Projects

Supported customer acquisition, community outreach, lead generation, event marketing, and conversion tracking across marketing projects.

::: {.project-tags}
<span>CRM</span>
<span>Digital Marketing</span>
<span>Customer Growth</span>
<span>Campaigns</span>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-number">04</span>
<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line project-icon"></i>

## Data Visualization

Built analytical workflows that transform raw data into clear, actionable business insights through dashboards and visual storytelling.

::: {.project-tags}
<span>Tableau</span>
<span>Power BI</span>
<span>Excel</span>
<span>Dashboards</span>
:::
:::

:::
